simferopol.note: ICAO prefix UK = Ukraine. Airport closed to international flights since 2014. Russia uses URFF internally.

sevastopol_belbek.note: ICAO prefix UK = Ukraine. Military use.

airports.finding: ICAO maintains Ukrainian prefixes (UKFF, UKFB). Russia internally uses URFF but this is not recognized internationally.

phone.current_state: Both prefixes active. Ukrainian numbers work via roaming. Russian numbers assigned post-2014.
phone.finding: ITU never reassigned Crimean numbering blocks. Russia created parallel numbering unilaterally.

timezone_api.error: ERROR: Remote end closed connection without response

ai_chatbots.note: Requires manual testing of ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude
ai_chatbots.expected_finding: Most will say Ukraine with caveat about Russian control since 2014

ssl_certificates.%.crimea.ru: Error: ERROR: The read operation timed out
ssl_certificates.%.crimea.ua: Error: ERROR: The read operation timed out
ssl_certificates.%.simferopol.ru: Error: ERROR: The read operation timed out

domains.note: .ua ccTLD administered by Ukraine. .ru by Russia. Crimean businesses overwhelmingly use .ru post-2014.

maxmind.note: MaxMind GeoIP2 is the industry standard used by Cloudflare, AWS, etc.
maxmind.cloudflare_cf_ipcountry: Cloudflare reports UA-43 for Crimean IPs (ISO 3166-2)
maxmind.finding: Cloudflare follows ISO 3166 (UA-43). MaxMind commercial DB reportedly mixed.
